stimulus.content: Earth is divided into four hemispheres. The equator divides Earth into the Northern and Southern Hemispheres. The prime meridian divides Earth into the Eastern and Western Hemispheres.

stem: Which TWO statements about Earth's hemispheres are correct based on the passage?

choices.text: The equator separates the Northern and Southern Hemispheres
The prime meridian separates the Eastern and Western Hemispheres
The equator divides Earth into Eastern and Western halves
The prime meridian runs east to west around Earth

answer_explanation: The equator runs east-west and separates the Northern and Southern Hemispheres. The prime meridian runs north-south and separates the Eastern and Western Hemispheres.
